name: prompt-cleaner
description: Cleans up your rambling prompts and sends them directly to Copilot Chat

enumDescriptions: Custom — any OpenAI-compatible endpoint (local servers like Ollama/LM Studio, OpenRouter, Hugging Face, etc.)
copilotPromptCleaner.provider.description: The AI provider to use for cleaning prompts

copilotPromptCleaner.openai.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for OpenAI. Get one at [platform.openai.com](https://platform.openai.com/api-keys)

copilotPromptCleaner.openai.model.description: OpenAI model to use (e.g. gpt-4o, gpt-4o-mini, gpt-4-turbo)

copilotPromptCleaner.claude.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for Anthropic Claude. Get one at [console.anthropic.com](https://console.anthropic.com/settings/keys)

copilotPromptCleaner.claude.model.description: Claude model to use (e.g. claude-opus-4-5, claude-sonnet-4-5, claude-haiku-4-5)

copilotPromptCleaner.grok.apiKey.markdownDescription: API key for xAI Grok. Get one at [console.x.ai](https://console.x.ai/team/default/api-keys)

copilotPromptCleaner.grok.model.description: Grok model to use (e.g. grok-4.3, grok-3)

copilotPromptCleaner.custom.endpoint.markdownDescription:
Base URL for the custom API endpoint (without `/v1`). Examples:
- Ollama (local): `http://localhost:11434`
- LM Studio (local): `http://localhost:1234`
- OpenRouter: `https://openrouter.ai/api`
- Hugging Face: `https://api-inference.huggingface.co`

copilotPromptCleaner.custom.model.markdownDescription:
Exact model name as required by the provider. Examples:
- Ollama: `llama3`, `mistral`, `phi3`
- OpenRouter: `mistralai/mixtral-8x7b-instruct`
- Hugging Face: `HuggingFaceH4/zephyr-7b-beta`

copilotPromptCleaner.custom.apiKey.description: API key for the custom provider. Leave empty for local servers that don't require authentication.

copilotPromptCleaner.model.description: Deprecated: Model to use for cleaning prompts

copilotPromptCleaner.apiKey.description: Deprecated: API key (for OpenAI or compatible providers)

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
